# Chemlake resolver database READMEs

Each database/identifier-family README in this directory is generated from `src/chem_evidence/routing_catalog.py`.

Update flow:

```bash
python scripts/generate_resolver_docs.py
```

## Database READMEs

- [PubChem Compound CID (`pubchem_cid`)](pubchem_cid/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [PubChem Substance SID (`pubchem_sid`)](pubchem_sid/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [CAS-like registry number (`cas`)](cas/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [HMDB (`hmdb`)](hmdb/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [ChEBI (`chebi`)](chebi/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [KEGG Compound (`kegg`)](kegg/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [LipidMaps (`lipidmaps`)](lipidmaps/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [DrugBank (`drugbank`)](drugbank/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [EPA CompTox / DSSTox (`comptox`)](comptox/README.md) — routes through **Xref index**
- [SPLASH / spectra sources (`splash`)](splash/README.md) — routes through **Spectra index**
- [Preferred names and synonyms (`name`)](name/README.md) — routes through **Name dictionary index**
- [Structure identifiers (`structure`)](structure/README.md) — routes through **Structure index**
- [Molecular formula (`formula`)](formula/README.md) — routes through **Formula fallback index**
- [InChIKey first block (`inchikey_block1`)](inchikey_block1/README.md) — routes through **Structure fallback index**
